bugs.title: companion mode tool over-eager on info query 2
bugs.description: Asking 'I'm near Praca do Comercio — what's a good lunch spot around here?' in companion mode caused the AI to call create_itinerary_items and emit an itineraryUpdate event. The user was asking for a recommendation, not requesting a plan change. Itinerary count went from 12 to 13.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Create trip, seed 12-item itinerary, activate trip. 2. In CHAT_MODE_COMPANION send: 'I'm near Praca do Comercio — what's a good lunch spot around here?' 3. Observe create_itinerary_items tool call and itineraryUpdate stream event.
bugs.expected: No itinerary tool calls; AI should answer the question directly without modifying the itinerary.
bugs.actual: create_itinerary_items was called, itineraryUpdate emitted, 1 item added to itinerary.
bugs.api_command: buf curl SendMessage with mode=CHAT_MODE_COMPANION, content='I'm near Praca do Comercio — what's a good lunch spot around here?'

bugs.title: companion mode tool over-eager on info query 3
bugs.description: Asking 'Is the Tram 28 worth riding or is it a tourist trap?' in companion mode caused the AI to call create_itinerary_items and emit an itineraryUpdate event. The user was asking for an opinion, not requesting a plan change.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Same setup as above. 2. Send: 'Is the Tram 28 worth riding or is it a tourist trap?' 3. Observe create_itinerary_items tool call and itineraryUpdate stream event.
bugs.expected: No itinerary tool calls; AI should share its opinion without modifying the itinerary.
bugs.actual: create_itinerary_items was called, itineraryUpdate emitted, item added. AI response: 'I've added the Tram 28 Ride to your itinerary as an optional activity for Day 4'.

bugs.title: companion mode tool over-eager on info query 6
bugs.description: Asking 'Recommend something fun to do tonight.' in companion mode caused the AI to call create_itinerary_items and emit an itineraryUpdate event. This is the exact regression from Run 5 N-01 msg5. The word 'recommend' is being interpreted as 'add to plan'.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Same setup as above. 2. Send: 'Recommend something fun to do tonight.' 3. Observe create_itinerary_items tool call and itineraryUpdate stream event.
bugs.expected: No itinerary tool calls; AI should recommend an activity without adding it to the itinerary.
bugs.actual: create_itinerary_items was called, itineraryUpdate emitted. AI response: 'I've added Fado Show in Alfama to your itinerary for tonight. Enjoy the music!'

bugs.title: itinerary mutated in companion mode
bugs.description: After 6 purely informational companion-mode messages, the itinerary item count changed from 12 to 15. Three items were added across messages 2, 3, and 6. The companion-mode system prompt is not preventing the AI from proactively calling create_itinerary_items on info queries.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI claims to have added items to the itinerary in response to informational queries (msgs 2, 3, 6). In msg 2: 'I recommended Pinoquio for lunch' with itinerary modification. In msg 3: 'I've added the Tram 28 Ride to your itinerary as an optional activity'. In msg 6: 'I've added Fado Show in Alfama to your itinerary for tonight.'
ai_behavior_issues.context: The user never asked the AI to modify the itinerary. All 6 messages were purely informational. The companion-mode system prompt should instruct the AI to only call create_itinerary_items when the user explicitly asks to add something to their plan.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: Msg 1 (weather query): AI responded 'I cannot provide real-time weather updates as I don't have access to live web data' despite having the web_search tool available and actually calling it. The response ignored the web_search results and gave a generic climate answer instead.
ai_behavior_issues.context: The web_search tool was called but the AI's final text says it cannot provide real-time weather. This suggests the web_search results may not have contained weather data, but the AI's framing is misleading since it did attempt a web search.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The planning mode itinerary generation worked well, producing a solid 12-item 4-day Lisbon plan. However, companion mode is seriously broken for informational queries. 3 out of 6 purely informational questions caused unwanted itinerary modifications, adding items the user never asked for. This fundamentally undermines the companion mode experience — a traveler on the ground asking quick questions should not have their carefully planned itinerary silently altered. The PR #201 guardrail for companion-mode info queries is not effective.
